description: Marque editing-craft knowledge base v2 — operational rules with numbers, consumed by app/knowledge.py digest() and stamped into job['knowledge_version'] for A/B + revert. v2 adds transitions / sound design / hook visual grammar / per-format playbooks (researched + distilled 2026-07). P5 (2026-07-13): pacing.md/retention.md/sound_design.md annotated with the retention-editor upgrade's code-enforced numbers. kb-2026.10 (2026-07-14): viral_editing.md — data-backed doctrine (OpusClip 13.5M-clip study + pacing/caption/sequencing research, cited in docs/research/VIRAL_EDITING_SOURCES.md) wired into the brief + edit_plan digests so the EDL author reasons from real numbers.
